revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[de:Amenophis-Feste]]
'''Amenophis Festivals''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Location map+ |Egypt |caption=Map of Egypt |width=170 |float=right |places= {{Location map~ |Egypt |label= '''Deir el-Medina''' |lat = 25/43/44/N |long = 32/36/05/E |region=EG |position=right }} }} The '''Amenophis Festivals''' existed until the {{ill|Twentieth Dynasty of Egypt|de|20. Dynastie (Ägypten)|ja|第20王朝|zh|第二十王朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twentieth Dynasty of Egypt|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} as a cult dedicated to the deified King {{ill|Amenhotep I|en|Amenhotep I|qid=Q157966|lt=Amenhotep I|1=Amenhotep I}}, celebrated by the {{ill|Ancient Egypt|en|Ancient Egypt|qid=Q11768|lt=Ancient Egyptians|1=Ancient Egypt}} on special days honoring Amenhotep I. The festivities began in the month of {{ill|Phamenoth|de|Phamenoth|ja|ファメノト|zh|法梅諾特|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Phamenoth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} with the "Great Festival of King Amenhotep," initiating the festival triad. This was followed by the death festival "Appearance of King Amenhotep" in February, concluding with the "Coronation Festival of King Amenhotep" in the month of {{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|ja|エピフィ|zh|埃皮菲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. These festivals took place in the temple of {{ill|Amun-Re|1=Amun-Ra|2=de|3=Amun-Re|4=fr|5=Amon-Rê|de|Amun-Re|1=Amun-Ra|2=de|3=Amun-Re|4=fr|5=Amon-Rê|ja|アメン・ラー|zh|阿蒙-拉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun-Re|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in the workers' village of {{ill|Deir el-Medina|en|Deir el-Medina|qid=Q750212|lt=Deir el-Medina|1=Deir el-Medina}}. == Festival Dates == The "Great Festival of King Amenhotep" and "Coronation Festival of King Amenhotep" were moveable feasts tied to the {{ill|Egyptian lunar calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト太陰暦|zh|埃及陰曆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Egyptian lunar calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} or the main {{ill|Egyptian calendar|en|Egyptian calendar|qid=Q254101|lt=Egyptian calendar|1=Egyptian calendar}}. In contrast, the death festival "Appearance of King Amenhotep" was celebrated on his actual death day. The following festival dates from the Twentieth Dynasty have been documented: {| border="2" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" rules="all" width="95%" style="clear:both; margin:1px 0 0em 0em; border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; border-collapse:collapse; empty-cells:show" | colspan="14" align=center style="background:#FFE39B; color:#773300" | '''Amenophis Festival Dates'''<ref name=K>Rolf Krauss: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Hildesheim 1985, p. 155.</ref> |- style="background:#FFE39B" ! Name ! Egyptian Date<ref name=K /> ! Civil Lunar Calendar<ref name= K/> ! {{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}}<ref>Jean Meeus: ''Astronomische Algorithmen - Anwendungen für Ephemeris Tool 4,5.'' Leipzig 2000, Calculation program Ephemeris-Tool 4.5.</ref> ! Notes |- |- style="background:#FFE39B" |colspan="10" align=left|'''Great Festival of King Amenhotep''' |- bgcolor="#f5f5f5" | {{ill|Ramesses VI|en|Ramesses VI|qid=Q5167|lt=Ramesses VI|1=Ramesses VI}} || {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|qid=Q2037143|lt=Peret|1=Season of the Emergence}} 26 Peret III 1139 BC || {{ill|Phamenoth|de|Phamenoth|ja|ファメノト|zh|法梅諾特|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Phamenoth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ||14 December 1139 BC<ref group="A">14 December 1139 BC of the Gregorian calendar corresponds to 26 December 1139 BC in the proleptic calendar.</ref> || Year 7 of reign |- |- style="background:#FFE39B" |colspan="10" align=left|'''Appearance of King Amenhotep''' |- bgcolor="#fffaf0" | {{ill|Ramesses X|en|Ramesses X|qid=Q4026|lt=Ramesses X|1=Ramesses X}} || {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|qid=Q1248622|lt=Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest}} 27 Shemu I 1106 BC ||{{ill|Pachon|de|Pa-en-Chonsu|1=Pa-en-Chonsu|ja|パコーンス|zh|帕孔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pachon|13=User:Immanuelle/Pa-en-Chonsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17 ||5 February 1106 BC<ref group="A">5 February 1106 BC of the Gregorian calendar corresponds to 16 February 1106 BC in the proleptic calendar.</ref> || Year 3 of reign |- |- style="background:#FFE39B" |colspan="10" align=left|'''Coronation Festival of King Amenhotep''' |- bgcolor="#f5f5f5" | Ramesses X || {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|qid=Q1248622|lt=Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest}} 9 Shemu III 1106 BC|| {{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|ja|エピフィ|zh|埃皮菲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ||19 March 1106 BC<ref group="A">19 March 1106 BC of the Gregorian calendar corresponds to 30 March 1106 BC in the proleptic calendar.</ref> || Year 3 of reign |- bgcolor="#fffaf0" |} == See also == * {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|ja|エーベルス暦|zh|埃伯斯曆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == Literature == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|羅爾夫·克勞斯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Invalid ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Jean Meeus|en|Jean Meeus|qid=Q1281654|lt=Jean Meeus|1=Jean Meeus}}: ''Astronomische Algorithmen – Anwendungen für Ephemeris Tool 4,5 .'' Barth, Leipzig 2000, ISBN 3-335-00400-0. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|qid=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker|1=Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|齊格弗里德·肖特|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464|1=Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der {{ill|Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur|en|Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur|qid=Q414163|lt=Academy of Sciences and Literature|1=Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur}}, Mainz/Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == <references responsive group="A" /> == References == <references /> {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}}
